title: dendranthema lavandulifolium var. aromaticum
intro: Dendranthema lavandulifolium var. aromaticum is a variant of the Dendranthema lavandulifolium plant, commonly known as a type of chrysanthemum, belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant is valued for its aromatic leaves and stems, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Dendranthema lavandulifolium var. aromaticum include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and experience its health benefits.
